context_text: <A> oh okay cause i've been a mystery shopper for about six years now / <B> uh-huh / <A> uh-huh and i've had really good luck with it it was real slow at first but um i just kind of kept hitting it and it finally we got our regular companies that we work for / <B> uh-huh / <A> and it's worked out really well it's been a great extra income for us / <B> uh-huh / <A> but it took a long time to get it going / <B> uh-huh / <A> and to figure out who we wanted to work for and what was going to be worth our time / <B> yeah
